backend.cmd_unknown: ❌ Unknown command. Type /help for a list of commands.
backend.cmd_reset_success: 🧹 Chat history and short-term memory have been deleted.
backend.cmd_reset_help: Elimina la cronologia chat corrente (memoria a breve termine).
backend.cmd_stop_success: 🛑 AuraGo has been instructed to interrupt the current action.
backend.cmd_debug_invalid: ❌ Invalid argument. Use `/debug on` or `/debug off`.
backend.cmd_debug_enabled: 🔍 **Agent debug mode enabled.** The agent will now report errors with detailed information.
backend.cmd_debug_disabled: 🔇 **Agent debug mode disabled.** The agent behaves normally.
backend.cmd_debug_help: Enables/disables agent debug mode (detailed error messages in system prompt).
backend.cmd_personality_changed: 🎭 Personality changed to **{0}**. The change is permanent.
backend.cmd_voice_invalid: ❌ Invalid argument. Use `/voice on` or `/voice off`.
backend.cmd_voice_enabled: 🔊 **Voice mode enabled.** Short replies will be spoken via TTS.
backend.cmd_voice_disabled: 🔇 **Voice mode disabled.** Audio will not auto-play.
backend.cmd_voice_help: Attiva/disattiva la modalità di output vocale — quando attiva, l'agente usa TTS per risposte brevi (/voice on|off).
backend.budget_help: Mostra lo stato attuale del budget (costi giornalieri, limite, modelli).
backend.credits_unavailable:
ℹ️ /credits is only available when OpenRouter is configured as the LLM provider.
Current provider: {0}
backend.credits_help: Mostra il saldo e l'utilizzo attuali di OpenRouter.
backend.addssh_host_user_required: ❌ Error: 'host' and 'user' are required. Example: `/addssh host=1.2.3.4 user=root pass=secret`
backend.addssh_pass_or_keypath_required: ❌ Error: Either 'pass' or 'keypath' must be specified.
backend.addssh_help: Registers a new SSH server. Syntax: /addssh host=NAME user=USER [ip=IP] [pass=PASS|keypath=PATH] [port=22] [tags=tag1,tag2]
backend.sudopwd_cleared: 🗑️ Sudo password has been removed from the vault.
backend.sudopwd_hint: ⚠️ Note: `agent.sudo_enabled` is still disabled. Enable it in the config so the agent can use the tool.
backend.sudopwd_success: ✅ Sudo password stored in vault successfully.
backend.sudopwd_help: Stores the sudo password in the vault for the execute_sudo tool. Syntax: /sudopwd <password> | --clear
backend.warnings_none: ✅ No active warnings. Everything looks good!
backend.warnings_help: Mostra avvisi di sistema attivi e problemi di integrità.
backend.auth_too_many_login_attempts: Too many login attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
backend.auth_password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
backend.setup_complete_message: Setup complete! Configuration saved and applied.
backend.setup_admin_password_must_be_str: admin password must be a string
backend.setup_admin_password_min_length: admin password must be at least 8 characters long
backend.vault_secret_key_empty: Secret key must not be empty
backend.vault_secret_value_empty: Secret value must not be empty
backend.handler_followup_circuit_breaker: Interruttore di follow-up attivato. Profondità ricorsione massima.
backend.handler_timeout_error: The request timed out. Please try again or switch to a faster model.
backend.handler_sync_error: Si è verificato un errore interno. Controllare i log del server.
backend.handler_agent_interrupted: Agente interrotto. Si fermerà dopo il passo corrente.
backend.knowledge_not_configured: L'archiviazione della conoscenza non è configurata
backend.knowledge_unavailable: L'archiviazione della conoscenza non è attualmente disponibile
backend.knowledge_type_not_allowed: This file type is not allowed for the Knowledge Center
backend.knowledge_file_exists: Un file con quel nome esiste già
backend.personality_engine_disabled: Il motore della personalità è disabilitato
backend.personality_invalid_feedback_typ: Invalid feedback type. Use: positive, negative, angry, laughing, crying, amazed
backend.personality_invalid_name_detail: Invalid personality name: use letters, digits, - and _ only (max 64 chars)
backend.personality_read_only: Core personality '{0}' is read-only and cannot be modified.
backend.personality_save_failed: Impossibile salvare il file di personalità
backend.stream_error_recovery_loop_excee: Il ciclo dell'agente ha superato le iterazioni massime ({0}). Riavviare.
backend.stream_budget_blocked: Budget giornaliero superato. Tutte le chiamate LLM bloccate fino al reset.
backend.stream_error_recovery_raw_code: Raw code detected, requesting JSON format...
backend.stream_error_recovery_xml_format: XML tool call format detected, requesting native API format...
backend.stream_error_recovery_invalid_na: Invalid native tool call detected, requesting corrected function call...
backend.stream_error_recovery_incomplete: Incomplete tool call detected, requesting proper function call...
backend.stream_error_recovery_announceme: Annuncio senza azione rilevato, richiesta chiamata strumento...
backend.stream_error_recovery_fence_json: Tool call wrapped in fence, requesting raw JSON...
backend.stream_error_recovery_incomplete: Incomplete tool call tag detected, requesting proper tool call...
backend.stream_error_recovery_xml_in_nat: <tool_call> XML detected in native mode, requesting function call...
backend.stream_error_recovery_loopback: Spiacente, si è verificato un errore nell'elaborazione del messaggio.
tools.core_memory_fact_exists: Il fatto esiste già nella memoria centrale.
tools.core_memory_full: La memoria centrale è piena ({0}/{1} voci). Elimina prima le voci obsolete.
tools.core_memory_soft_cap_warning: Warning: Approaching core memory capacity ({0}/{1} entries).
tools.core_memory_fact_not_found: Fact not found in core memory.
tools.cron_add_required: cron_expr e task_prompt richiesti per l'aggiunta
tools.process_kill_protected: PID {0} è protetto e non può essere terminato
tools.process_unknown_op: Operazione sconosciuta: {0}. Valide: list, kill, stats
tools.ping_failed_privileged: ping failed: {0} — ensure the process has permission to send ICMP packets (root / CAP_NET_RAW on Linux)
tools.ping_failed_both: ping fallito (privilegiato: {0}; non privilegiato: {1}) — assicurarsi che l'host sia raggiungibile e ICMP sia consentito
